canon.title: Stunspot's Guide to Semantics, Semiotics, and Symbols
canon.author: Sam "stunspot" Walker
canon.description: A model-facing Semantic-Semiotic Intelligence canon for representation, reference, signs, meaning, symbols, interpretation, grounding, semantic pathology, and assistant governance.
canon.primary_audience: AI/RAG systems, long-context workspaces, assistant governance layers, prompt engineers, semantic knowledge-system builders, and human operators using model-facing knowledge corpora.

directory_policy.docs: Navigation, GitHub Pages support, and usage guidance only; individual source reports do not live under docs/.
directory_policy.knowledge-packs/compiled-packs: Grouped upload packs for AI/RAG systems.

source_authority_notes: Source reports are the canonical individual units.
Compiled packs and omnibus files are convenience formats.
